zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Neville於1460年11月10日出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，她的父親Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny20歲，母親Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny16歲。她於1491年7月1日之前與Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone在英國結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Neville于1460年11月10日出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼时，她的父亲Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny20岁，母亲Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny16岁。她于1491年7月1日之前与Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone在英国结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Neville was born on 10 November 1460, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny, was 16. She married Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone before 1 July 1491, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1500, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Neville est née le 10 novembre 1460, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone avant 1 juillet 1491, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Neville am 10. November 1460 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny 16. Sie hat vor 1. Juli 1491 in England Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Neville è nata il il 10 novembre 1460 nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone prima del 1 luglio 1491, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nevilleが1460年11月10日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavennyは20歳，母Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavennyは16歳であった。1491年7月1日以前にイギリスでSir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Neville(이)가 1460년 11월 10일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1491년 7월 1일 이전 영국에서 Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Neville nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1460, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone antes 1 de julho de 1491, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Neville родилась 10 ноября 1460 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone перед 1 июля 1491 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Neville nació el 10 de noviembre de 1460, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Berkeley Knight Of Beverstone antes de 1 de julio de 1491, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1500, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
